The '''M-TD series''', also known as the '''M-TD translator droid''', was a model of [[Translator droid/Legends|translator droid]] manufactured by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was based on [[M-TD]], a miniature droid built by [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] although they failed to trademark the design.

==Description==
The M-TD series was a [[Micro repulsorlift|micro]] [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]]-equipped [[Translator droid/Legends|translator droid]] that was capable of speaking its owner's [[Language/Legends|language]] and a select few other languages specified by the owner. However, it lacked the full [[TranLang III communications module/Legends|TranLang III communications module]] of the more-capable [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droid]]. Like 3PO units, M-TD [[Translator/Legends|translator]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were equipped with a [[Computer/Legends|computer]] interface port and [[Circuit breaker|shutdown switch]].<ref name="RPG-Core" />

==History==
The M-TD series was based on the droid [[M-TD]], a miniaturiazed translator droid built by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and the [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. The droid was a gift for Chewbacca's nephew [[Lowbacca]], who was training to be a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] at [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="EGTD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

The success of the unit sparked interest from the droid industry, and rumors began circulating that Cybot Galactica planned to produce a similar design for sale.<ref name="EGTD" /> Eventually, Cybot Galactica released the M-TD series to the consumer market since the design had not been trademarked by either of its creators. The droid was marketed to individuals who could not afford a full [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]], or for those who sought a more compact or mobile translator.<ref name="RPG-Core" />

==Behind the scenes==
The M-TD series was based on [[M-TD]], the translator droid introduced in ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Heirs of the Force]]''<ref name="HotF">''[[Young Jedi Knights: Heirs of the Force]]''</ref> which is set in [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]]<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> meaning that any appearance of the M-TD series should be from that date onwards. Despite this, [[Wizards of the Coast]] published several roleplaying adventures set during the era of the [[Prequel trilogy]] that included the M-TD series translator droid.
